description: Dependency update PRs for Helm charts (Argo Applications), pinned images in raw manifests, and GitHub Actions. Every PR runs the validate workflow (kubeconform + gitleaks) before merge. No automerge — chart bumps on this cluster are deliberate.

packageRules.description: hhccia images are pinned to git SHAs by the deploy flow (task images:latest) — Renovate must not touch them.
Group the observability chart bumps (prometheus/loki/grafana/alloy) so they can be validated together.
